notes: v1.14.66 - Golden node pins: gold CoreWeave city markers projected (orthographic) onto the baked globe as a pointer-events:none overlay, so tap-anywhere entry still fires. Austin = haloed hub. 18 confirmed cities (PLA/ELL/KEN withheld as unverified). Portrait-calibrated; pins hidden on landscape until landscape calibration. ?cal=1 scrubs the 6 projection params and COPYs the result.
